---
title: "Discrete with extinction"
author: "Caleb"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Load trees


```{r}

library(treats)

bd_params <- make.bd.params(speciation = 1, extinction = 0.7)

stop_rule <- list(max.living = 50)
set.seed(11)

mass_extinction <- make.events(
                      target       = "taxa",
                      condition    = age.condition(5),
                      modification = random.extinction(0.70))



# selective_extinction <- make.events(
#       target = "taxa",
#       condition = age.condition(x = 8, condition = `==`),
#       condition = trait.extinction(x = 0, condition = `>`),
#       event.name = "Trait-based extinction"
#     )

trait.extinction <- make.events(
                      target = "taxa",
                      condition = age.condition(6),
                      modification = trait.extinction(x = 1, trait = 1:50))


slow_binary_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.99, 0.01,
    0.01, 0.99
), nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)

slow_multi_transitions <- matrix(c(
    0.99, 0.025, 0.025,
    0.025, 0.99, 0.025,
    0.025, 0.025, 0.99
), nrow = 3, byrow = TRUE)

slow_binary <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 85, process.args = list(transitions = slow_binary_transitions))
slow_multi <- treats::make.traits(process = discrete.process, n = 15, process.args = list(transitions = slow_multi_transitions))

## simulate selective extinction
bm_traits <- treats(traits = slow_binary, stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 10000, replicates = 5, events = trait.extinction)

ou_traits <- treats(traits = ou, stop.rule = stop_rule, bd.params = bd_params, null.error = 10000, replicates = 5, events = trait.extinction)


bm_traits <- lapply(bm_traits, drop.singles)
ou_traits <- lapply(ou_traits, drop.singles)

cont_traits <- list(bm = bm_traits, ou = ou_traits)



```
